public_training_support_route.value: Luxembourg company-training co-financing exists at scheme level, with 15% base aid and 35% salary-cost weighting for certain eligible participants.

value: Scheme-level Luxembourg co-financing exists, but exact eligibility for this service is unproven.
No public source proves that any Ministry-of-Education certification implies INFPC eligibility.
The compound competitor story overreaches: freelancer tracking and an exhaustive substitute map are not verified.
Multilingual delivery and flexible scheduling are not unique on public evidence; the analytics edge remains unproven.

target_audience_summary.value: Luxembourg HR and employer buyers seeking broad corporate language delivery with flexible scheduling and reporting expectations.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: Useful synthesis, but still partly inferential for the exact service.

independent_operator_examples.name: Prolingua tailor-made courses
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Public tailored corporate language offer overlaps directly with the category.

independent_operator_examples.name: inlingua Luxembourg
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Broad commercial corporate-language supplier in the same market.

independent_operator_examples.name: Berlitz for Business
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Large commercial benchmark proving the lane is already served.

pricing_or_offer_proof: Current proof shows tailored corporate offers exist, but no fragmented operator pricing layer.
value.social_funnel_signal: No Facebook-group-led funnel signal is captured yet in the validated evidence set.

segment_weighting.rationale: B2B product. Operator proof relevance: medium. Social funnel relevance: low. Broad private providers count, but weaker than niche independent operators.

value.takeaway: Corporate language demand exists, but the visible market is served by established schools rather than a long tail of small operators.
value.why_not_stronger: The current wedge is category existence, not a fragmented operator market.

independent_operator_summary.omission_reason: Derived independent-operator signal for prioritization and further market research. Keep it out of customer-facing copy until translated into product-safe language.

product_specific_funding_eligibility.omission_reason: Route-level co-financing exists, but service-level eligibility is not proven.

unique_delivery_edge.omission_reason: Public evidence already shows tailored and flexible competing offers, while the analytics layer is not externally proven.
